fixes_applied.issue: Inconsistent field paths - used nested WorkspaceProperties.RootVolumeEncryptionEnabled instead of top-level RootVolumeEncryptionEnabled
fixes_applied.fix: Changed field paths from item.WorkspaceProperties.RootVolumeEncryptionEnabled to item.RootVolumeEncryptionEnabled (and same for UserVolumeEncryptionEnabled) to match emit structure and be consistent with aws.workspaces.volume.encryption_enabled rule

notes: aws.workspaces.restapi.public_access_restricted metadata says 'public access restricted' but YAML checks encryption fields. This may be a metadata/YAML mismatch, but metadata is generic and doesn't specify exact fields to check.

aws.workspaces.resource.workspaces_directory_enable_maintenance_mode_configured metadata says 'maintenance mode' but YAML checks EnableWorkDocs. This may be a metadata/YAML mismatch, but metadata is generic and doesn't specify exact fields to check.
